author: anon-59ff128d
content: Extracted a Mode enum (Script, UndoList, Undo, Pipe, JsonStdin, JsonArg, JsonMissingInput, PipeNoJson, File) and a resolve_mode(&Cli, stdin_is_tty) -> Mode function. run() is now a flat match on Mode variants with no nested if/else chains. Cyclomatic complexity reduced from ~16-18 to ~6. All 177 tests pass.
